name: robert-personal
description: Personal Claude Code plugins for Robert Ghafoor

plugins.name: jira-ticket
plugins.description: Auto-starts the right workflow when a Jira ticket ID is mentioned. Looks up the ticket, ensures a deduplicated branch exists, assesses complexity, and hands off to the correct superpowers tier.

plugins.name: optimize-skill-description
plugins.description: Iteratively improves a skill's description field to trigger at the right times. Uses inline self-evaluation — no API key or subprocess calls needed, works on Windows.

plugins.name: itwillsync
plugins.description: Sync any terminal AI coding agent (Claude Code, Aider, Goose, or any shell command) to a phone or tablet over the local network. Zero install on the phone — scan QR, open browser, done.
